summary: McKenzie shares a humorous flowchart about Google searches and ties it back to his own advertising strategy. He notes the irony of laughing at About.com jokes while simultaneously paying them for high-performing ad placement. He teases an upcoming post about how Google's Conversion Optimizer generated significant revenue during his Halloween bingo cards campaign.
key_points: A humorous Google search flowchart resonated with McKenzie's SEO-focused audience
McKenzie was paying About.com $100 for ad placement on a high-ranking Halloween bingo cards page
Google's Conversion Optimizer reportedly generated around $500 in revenue during the Halloween season
money_quotes: I probably shouldn't laugh so much about the About.com joke, considering I sent them about $100 to put an incredibly high performing ad on that page sitting at #1 on 'Halloween bingo cards'.
key_insight: Even the sites you might mock in the SEO world can be valuable advertising partners when they hold top rankings for your target keywords.
